summary: Documented cycle-based alignment flow: four compiler loops, pure build-validation gateway, planning_build roadmap handoff, TDD-aligned implementation, and lean graph traceability role.
knowledge_changes: .codewiki/kb/system/compilers.md defines feedback -> documentation -> planning -> implementation and cycle-as-build compiler semantics.
.codewiki/kb/system/builds.md defines feedback_build, documentation_build, planning_build, implementation_build, cycle metadata, consumption signals, and publication retention.
.codewiki/kb/system/validation-gateway.md simplifies the gateway to validating submitted builds against policy/source/evidence with pass/fail/block verdicts.
.codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md assigns roadmap alignment to the planning loop and defines roadmap items as work truth, not requirement briefs.
.codewiki/kb/system/graph.md defines the graph as a lean hot state machine/index with requirement traceability-gap reporting, not the alignment source.
.codewiki/kb/system/overview.md updates truth boundaries and compiler model to include planning_build and pure gateway semantics.
.codewiki/kb/lexicon.md adds alignment cycle, planning compiler/build, requirement ID, and traceability matrix terms.
.codewiki/kb/product/users/agents.md updates agent success signals to include planning builds.

skills/codewiki/SKILL.md, skills/codewiki-feedback/SKILL.md, skills/codewiki-documentation/SKILL.md, skills/codewiki-implementation/SKILL.md, and skills/codewiki-verify/SKILL.md update compiler routing and validation language.
roadmap_changes: Created TASK-073 to implement planning build/cycle metadata, pure gateway semantics, graph traceability routing, and freshness fixes in code/tests.
assumptions: This documentation build captures target design while current tooling still lacks planning_build and may report incomplete routing until TASK-073 is implemented.
Routine roadmap creation should move to planning_build once TASK-073 lands; this documentation compiler created TASK-073 as a migration exception.
Requirement ids and traceability matrix details will be finalized in implementation based on schema and graph constraints.
open_questions: Exact planning_build schema field names and compatibility behavior remain implementation decisions for TASK-073.
Whether traceability is stored inside index_graph.json or computed on-demand remains open within the docs' guardrail: graph is an index, not truth.
